category_sources: Official GitHub README describes a Python script converting EasyEDA/LCSC components to KiCad libraries.
source_facts.description says it converts electronic components from EasyEDA or LCSC to a KiCad library.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title uses easyeda2kicad.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides installation, usage, and documentation references for command/data formats.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project URL.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes KiCad library generation including symbols, footprints, and 3D models.
source_facts.description identifies EasyEDA, LCSC, KiCad, and electronic component conversion.
